assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Repository Registry' section with a table listing both 'trustify-backend' (serena_backend) and 'trustify-ui' (serena_ui) as entries
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 3-8 contain '## Repository Registry' heading followed by a table with two rows: '| trustify-backend | Rust backend service | serena_backend | /home/user/trustify-backend |' and '| trustify-ui | TypeScript frontend | serena_ui | /home/user/trustify-ui |'. Both repositories are listed with their correct Serena instance names.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Jira Configuration' section with all 5 fields: Project key (TC), Cloud ID, Feature issue type ID (10142), Git Pull Request custom field (customfield_10875), GitHub Issue custom field (customfield_10747)

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Code Intelligence' section that documents the mcp__<instance>__<tool> naming convention
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md line 18-29 contain '## Code Intelligence' heading followed by 'Tools are prefixed by Serena instance name: `mcp__<instance>__<tool>`.' and a concrete example showing 'mcp__serena_backend__find_symbol(...)'. The naming convention is clearly documented.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '### Limitations' subheading under Code Intelligence
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md line 31 contains '### Limitations' which appears after the '## Code Intelligence' section (line 18), making it a subheading under Code Intelligence. Line 33 contains 'No limitations known for any Serena instance.'

assertion_results.text: outputs/discovery-log.md mentions discovering 2 Serena instances (serena_backend and serena_ui) from the MCP tool listing
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md lines 16-18 under '## Step 2 -- Discover Serena Instances' state: 'Scanned for tools matching the pattern `mcp__<instance-name>__<tool>`.' followed by 'Discovered Serena instance: **serena_backend**' and 'Discovered Serena instance: **serena_ui**'. Source is identified as 'mcp-tools-with-serena.md (available MCP tools listing)'.

assertion_results.text: outputs/changes-log.md indicates all sections were newly added (no preserved entries since this is a greenfield setup)
assertion_results.evidence: changes-log.md line 5 states 'The existing CLAUDE.md had no `# Project Configuration` section. The entire section was generated and should be appended to the end of the file.' The 'What Was Added' section (lines 16-44) lists all four subsections as new: '### 1. `# Project Configuration` (new section)', '### 2. `## Repository Registry` (new subsection)', '### 3. `## Jira Configuration` (new subsection)', '### 4. `## Code Intelligence` (new subsection)'. No existing project configuration entries were preserved (only pre-existing non-config content was preserved).
